databrew.recipe.conditionexpression.Cond.Docs: A specific condition to apply to a recipe action. For more information, see [Recipe structure](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/databrew/latest/dg/recipe-structure.html) in the *AWS Glue DataBrew Developer Guide*.

databrew.recipe.conditionexpression.Targ.Docs: A column to apply this condition to.

databrew.recipe.conditionexpression.Valu.Docs: A value that the condition must evaluate to for the condition to succeed.
